name: collab-task-manager
description: Collaborative Task Manager — a Trello-like team task board (React capstone, Option B).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @ctm/api" "npm run dev -w @ctm/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ctm/api && npm run build -w @ctm/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @ctm/web && npm run lint -w @ctm/api
